BaseField.Name: Label Instructions
BaseField.Text: Visit the Forest Practices Forms and Applications page for more information on forest practices applications and forms.

ItemList.string: 7. Historic sites and/or Native American cultural resources

BaseField.Name: Label333
BaseField.Text: Instructions: To upload documentation, select the document type and then select the upload button below. View documentation by selecting the View Documentation button.

BaseField.Name: Label Owner Type
BaseField.Text: Select the Landowner type you want to add:*

BaseField.Name: Label229
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Search Business ID Number
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Landowner Business Search Business ID Number

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Landowner Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Label265
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Label289
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: DG Landowners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowner Businesses Signer
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label361
BaseField.Text: Select the Timber Owner type you want to add:*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpTimberOwnerBusinessIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Help Timber Owner Business Or Individual

BaseField.Name: Label368
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Timber Owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Business Name
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Business Name

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Business ID Number
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Business ID Number

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Province State
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Province State

BaseField.Name: Label400
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Label424
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a timber owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owner Businesses Signer
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label429
BaseField.Text: Select the Operator type you want to add:*

BaseField.Name: Label436
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search Business ID Number
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Search Business ID Number

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Label468
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Label492
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: DG Operators
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Operator Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Operator Businesses Signer
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label121
BaseField.Text: 2. What is the total acreage and legal description of each unit?

BaseField.Name: Label123
BaseField.Text: What is the total acreage and legal description of each unit?*

BaseField.Name: Label179
BaseField.Text: 3. Are you substituting prescriptions from an approved state or federal conservation agreement or Watershed Analysis?

BaseField.Name: Label501
BaseField.Text: Are you substituting prescriptions from an approved state or federal conservation agreement or Watershed Analysis? *

BaseField.Name: Label502
BaseField.Text: Note: The applicable HCP crosswalk or an Appendix I. Watershed Analysis Worksheet must be included.

BaseField.Name: Label503
BaseField.Text: List the chemicals being proposed for use for each unit.*

BaseField.Name: Label155
BaseField.Text: 5. Answer all of the following questions:

BaseField.Name: Label133
BaseField.Text: a. Is this Forest Practices Application/Notification within an urban growth area?*

BaseField.Name: Within the City Limits or an Urban Growth Area
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Within the city limits or an urban growth area? Yes or No. If yes, include SEPA Environmental Checklist, SEPA Determination, or approved 10-year management plan.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpWithinCityLimits
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Within the city limits or an urban growth area? Yes or No. If yes, include SEPA Environmental Checklist, SEPA Determination, or approved 10-year management plan.

BaseField.Name: Label508
BaseField.Text: Note: if yes, then one the following must be attached:

BaseField.Name: Label510
BaseField.Text: 2. SEPA checklist or SEPA determination from local government

BaseField.Name: Label135
BaseField.Text: b. Is this Forest Practices Application/Notification within a public park?*

BaseField.Name: Within a Public Park
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Within a public park? Yes or No. If yes, include SEPA Environmental Checklist or SEPA Determination.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpWithinPublicPark
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Within a public park? Yes or No. If yes, include SEPA Environmental Checklist or SEPA Determination.

BaseField.Name: Label513
BaseField.Text: • If yes, a SEPA checklist must be attached

BaseField.Name: Label139
BaseField.Text: c. Within 500 feet of a public park?*

BaseField.Name: Within 500 Feet of a Public Park
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Within 500 feet of a public park? Yes or No.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpWithin500FeetPublicPark
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Within 500 feet of a public park? Yes or No.

BaseField.Name: Within 500 Feet of a Public Park Name
Label143
BaseField.Text: d. Is th﻿is Forest Practices Application/Notification part of an Alternate Plan?*

BaseField.Name: An Alternate Plan
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: An Alternate Plan? Yes or No. If yes, include a copy of the Alternate Plan.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpAnAlternatePlan
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Dropdown: An Alternate Plan? Yes or No. If yes, include a copy of the Alternate Plan.

BaseField.Name: Label326
BaseField.Text: Note: if yes, the alternate plan must be attached.

BaseField.Name: Label145
BaseField.Text: e. Are you proposing to use a chemical that is not registered or that is for a use that is not allowed under the label?*

BaseField.Name: Chemical Not Registered or Allowed
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Using a chemical that is not registered or for a use that is not allowed under the label? Yes or No. If yes, include a copy of your Experimental Use Permit and a SEPA Environmental Checklist.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpChemicalNotRegistered
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Using a chemical that is not registered or for a use that is not allowed under the label? Yes or No. If yes, include a copy of your Experimental Use Permit and a SEPA Environmental Checklist.

BaseField.Name: Label327
BaseField.Text: Note: if yes, Experimental Use Permit and SEPA checklist or SEPA determination must be attached.

BaseField.Name: Label147
BaseField.Text: f. Are you proposing to apply a pesticide within a Type A or B Wetland?*

BaseField.Name: Applying a Pesticide in a Type A or Type B Wetland
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Applying a pesticide in a Type A or Type B Wetland? Yes or No. If yes, include a SEPA Environmental Checklist or SEPA Determination.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpApplyingPesticide
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Applying a pesticide in a Type A or Type B Wetland? Yes or No. If yes, include a SEPA Environmental Checklist or SEPA Determination.

BaseField.Name: Label328
BaseField.Text: Note: if yes, a SEPA checklist or SEPA determination must be attached.

BaseField.Name: Label149
BaseField.Text: 6. Are you spraying 240 contiguous acres or more?

BaseField.Name: Label150
BaseField.Text: Are you spraying 240 contiguous acres or more?*

BaseField.Name: Spraying 240 or More Contiguous Acres
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Are you spraying 240 or more contiguous acres? Yes or No.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpContiguousAcres
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Are you spraying 240 or more contiguous acres? Yes or No.

BaseField.Name: DataField8
BaseField.Text: Note: Include a SEPA Environmental Checklist or SEPA Determination.

BaseField.Name: Label154
BaseField.Text: 7. Have you reviewed this forest practices activity area to determine whether it may involve historic sites and/or Native American cultural resources?

BaseField.Name: Label156
BaseField.Text: Have you reviewed this forest practices activity area to determine whether it may involve historic sites and/or Native American cultural resources?*

BaseField.Name: Reviewed for Historic Sites or Native American Resources
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Dropdown: Have you reviewed this forest practices activity area to determine whether it may involve historic sites and/or Native American cultural resources? Read the instructions before answering this question. Yes or No.

BaseField.Name: btn_HelpHistoricSites
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Have you reviewed this forest practices activity area to determine whether it may involve historic sites and/or Native American cultural resources? Read the instructions before answering this question. Yes or No.

BaseField.Name: Label158
BaseField.Text: Note: If yes, describe how you reviewed. If cultural resources are found, include who was contacted and whether a management plan was agreed upon. Do not include location of cultural sites on Activity Map.

BaseField.Name: Reviewed for Historic Sites or Native American Resources Information
Label159
BaseField.Text: 8. Additional Information (attach additional pages if necessary):

BaseField.Name: Additional Information
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Multiline Text box for additional information

BaseField.Name: Redacted Content
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Multiline Text box for redacted content

BaseField.Name: DataField11
BaseField.Text: * The information on this application/notification is true.

BaseField.Name: DataField12
BaseField.Text:
* We understand this proposed forest practice is subject to:
  • The Forest Practices Act and Rules, AND
  • All other federal, state or local regulations.

BaseField.Name: Label335
BaseField.Text: * Compliance with the Forest Practices Act and Rules does not ensure compliance with the Endangered Species Act or other federal, state or local laws.

BaseField.Name: Label336
BaseField.Text: * We understand that applying chemicals is not an activity included as part of the DNR’s Incidental Take Permit for aquatic resources.

BaseField.Name: Label337
BaseField.Text:
* Inadvertent Discovery – Chapter 27.44, 27.53, 68.50 and 68.60 RCW
  • If you find or suspect you have found an archeological object or Native American cairn, grave, or glyptic record, immediately cease disturbance activity, protect the area and promptly contact the Department of Archaeology and Historic Preservation at 360-586-3077.
  • If you find or suspect you have found human skeletal remains, immediately cease disturbance activity, protect the area, and contact the County Coroner or Medical Examiner and local law enforcement as soon as possible. Failure to report human remains is a misdemeanor.

BaseField.Name: Label180
BaseField.Text: The landowner understands that by signing and submitting this FPA, he/she is authorizing the Department of Natural Resources to enter the property in order to review the proposal, inspect aerial chemical operations, and monitor compliance for up to three years after its expiration date. RCW 76.09.150

BaseField.Name: DataField14
BaseField.Text: *NOTE: if you are a “Perpetual Timber Rights Owner,” and are submitting this without the landowner’s signature, provide written evidence the landowner has been notified.

BaseField.Name: Label359
BaseField.Text: You can manage your submitted application by selecting one of the following actions.

BaseField.Name: Label360
BaseField.Text:
• Withdrawal Request: Request to withdraw or close your application.
  • Notice of Transfer: Transfer the approved application or notification to a new landowner, timber owner or operator. See WAC 222-20-010(6)/(7) for additional information.
  • Amendment Request: Request non-substantial changes to your approved application or notification. See WAC 222-20-060 for additional information.
  • Renewal Request: Request to extend your approved application or notification by an additional three years with the applicable fee. See WAC 222-20-080 for additional information.
  • Copy Application: This action copies all contents of this application, including any uploaded documents. After copying, you can edit the copy and submit it as a new, unique application.

BaseField.Name: DG Signatures
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

Group.GroupName: Read Only Activity Map for Proponents
Show Question 5b Note and Park Name
Show Question 5c Note and Park Name

FormScriptItem.Name: AddNewBusiness
AddTimberOwnerContactModal
HandleNavigation
CallLibSignatureSendNotifications
PrintPDF
FormScriptItem.Script:
const destinationURL = `${VV.BaseURL}ReportViewer?rpid=6c3f7c76-0431-f011-82d4-c3102142a75d&formId=${VV.Form.DhDocID}`;
window.open(destinationURL, "_blank");

FormScriptItem.Name: City_Landowner_onBlur
Additional_Information_onBlur
btnRemoveSelectedLandownerBusinessesSigner_onClick
An_Alternate_Plan_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("An Alternate Plan");

FormScriptItem.Name: Within_500_Feet_of_a_Public_Park_Name_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Within 500 Feet of a Public Park Name');

FormScriptItem.Name: btn_HelpChemicalInformation_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script:
const styles = `style="text-align: justify"`; const modalContent = `

The landowner understands that by signing and submitting this Aerial Chemical, he/she is authorizing the Department of Natural Resources to enter the property in order to review the proposal, inspect harvest operations, and monitor compliance for up to three years after its expiration date. RCW 76.09.150.

The legal Landowner, Timber Owner, and Operator must EACH sign and record the date of signature before this application can be accepted.

  • If all three are the same, only the Landowner box needs to be signed and dated.
`; VV.Form.Global.CentralMessages("Help", { helpTitle: "Acknowledge", helpText: modalContent, helpTextAlignment: "left", });

FormScriptItem.Name: Phone_Timber_Owner_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Phone Timber Owner');

FormScriptItem.Name: Operator_First_Name_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Operator First Name');

FormScriptItem.Name: List_Of_Questions_onChange
FormScriptItem.Script: // List_Of_Questions_onChange for Forest Practices Aerial Chemical Application Notification VV.Form.Template.QuestionDropDownChange();

FormScriptItem.Name: btnTimberOwnerSearch_onClick
County_Operator_onBlur
btnResubmit_onClick
btn_HelpWithin500FeetPublicPark_onClick
btnHelpOperatorBusinessSearch_onClick
btn_helpNameContacts_onClick
btnHelpOperatorBusinessOrIndividual_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script:
const styles = `style="text-align: justify"`; const modalContent = `

Choose whether the operator is a business or an individual:

  • If you select Business, you will be able to search for and add a business to the application. You will also be able to search for and add operators associated with that business.
  • If you select Individual, you will only see the option to search for and add individual operators.
`; VV.Form.Global.CentralMessages("Help", { helpTitle: "1c Is the operator a business or an individual", helpText: modalContent, helpTextAlignment: "left", });

btn_HelpAcknowledge_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script:
const styles = `style="text-align: justify"`; const modalContent = `

The landowner understands that by signing and submitting this Aerial Chemical, he/she is authorizing the Department of Natural Resources to enter the property in order to review the proposal, inspect harvest operations, and monitor compliance for up to three years after its expiration date. RCW 76.09.150.

The legal Landowner, Timber Owner, and Operator must EACH sign and record the date of signature before this application can be accepted.

  • If all three are the same, only the Landowner box needs to be signed and dated.
`; VV.Form.Global.CentralMessages("Help", { helpTitle: "Acknowledge", helpText: modalContent, helpTextAlignment: "left", });

FormScriptItem.Script:
const styles = `style="text-align: justify"`; const modalContent = `

Choose whether the landowner is a business or an individual:

  • If you select Business, you will be able to search for and add a business to the application. You will also be able to search for and add landowners associated with that business.
  • If you select Individual, you will only see the option to search for and add individual landowners.
`; VV.Form.Global.CentralMessages("Help", { helpTitle: "1a Is the landowner a business or an individual", helpText: modalContent, helpTextAlignment: "left", });

FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Email Landowner');

FormScriptItem.Name: Show_All_Questions_CheckBox_onChange
FormScriptItem.Script: const chkValue = VV.Form.GetFieldValue('Show All Questions CheckBox'); VV.Form.SetFieldValue('Show All Questions', chkValue);

FormScriptItem.Name: Region_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Region");

FormScriptItem.Name: Within_a_Public_Park_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Within a Public Park");

FormScriptItem.Name: btnHelpTimberOwnerBusinessIndividual_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script:
const styles = `style="text-align: justify"`; const modalContent = `

Choose whether the timber owner is a business or an individual:

  • If you select Business, you will be able to search for and add a business to the application. You will also be able to search for and add timber owners associated with that business.
  • If you select Individual, you will only see the option to search for and add individual timber owners.
`; VV.Form.Global.CentralMessages("Help", { helpTitle: "1b Is the Timber Owner a business or an individual", helpText: modalContent, helpTextAlignment: "left", });

FormScriptItem.Name: Status_onChange
Timber_Owner_Same_Landowner_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Timber Owner Same Landowner');

FormScriptItem.Name: Reviewed_for_Historic_Sites_or_Native_American_Resources_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Reviewed for Historic Sites or Native American Resources");

FormScriptItem.Name: btnHelpOperatorOwnerSearch_onClick
Within_the_City_Limits_or_an_Urban_Growth_Area_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Within the City Limits or an Urban Growth Area");

FormScriptItem.Name: btn_helpNameTimberOwner_onClick
btnTabManage_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.SetFieldValue('Tab Control', 'Manage', true);

FormScriptItem.Name: Timber_Owner_First_Name_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Timber Owner First Name');

FormScriptItem.Name: btnActivityMap_onClick
Show_All_Questions_onChange
City_Operator_onBlur
Timber_Owner_Business_Name_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Timber Owner Business Name');

FormScriptItem.Name: Zip_Code_Operator_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Global.AddressVerificationOnBlur('operatorInformationAddress');

FormScriptItem.Name: btnRemoveSelectedTimberOwnersBusinesses_onClick
btnTimberBusinessSearch_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: // btnTimberOwnerSearch_onClick.js for Forest Aerial Chemical Application VV.Form.Template.BusinessSearch('Timber Owner');

FormScriptItem.Name: Country_Landowner_onChange
btnTabSignatures_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.SetFieldValue('Tab Control', 'Signatures', true);

FormScriptItem.Name: btnViewDocumentation_onClick
btnBack_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: // btnBack_onClick for FPA Aerial Chemical Application VV.Form.Template.HandleNavigation('Back');

FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Chemical Not Registered or Allowed");

FormScriptItem.Name: County_Landowner_onBlur
Last_Name_Contact_Person_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Contact Person Last Name');

FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('First Name Landowner');

Phone_Operator_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation('Phone Operator');

Spraying_240_or_More_Contiguous_Acres_onBlur
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.FormValidation("Spraying 240 or More Contiguous Acres");

FormScriptItem.Script: // btnOperatorBusinessSearch_onClick.js for Forest Aerial Chemical Application VV.Form.Template.BusinessSearch('Operator');

FormScriptItem.Name: btnAmendmentRequest_onClick
btnTabFourTwo_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: alert('This is another active tab button.');
